divineMarks.name: Divine Mark: Bone Cradle
divineMarks.symbol: A bone cradle filled with flowers
divineMarks.vision: A mountain breathing like a sleeping beast.
divineMarks.omen: The character hears a heartbeat beneath stone.
divineMarks.rulesText: Once per long rest, when you are knocked prone or moved against your will, you may immediately reduce the forced movement by 10 feet or stand without spending movement.
divineMarks.burden: Animals sometimes flinch from you. Large stone structures seem to breathe when you are alone.

divineMarks.name: Divine Mark: Silver Spear
divineMarks.symbol: A silver spear beneath a red moon
divineMarks.vision: A forest running away from the hunter.
divineMarks.omen: The character hears distant horns and many feet moving as one.
divineMarks.rulesText: Once per long rest, you may add 1d4 to an initiative roll or Wisdom (Survival) check.
divineMarks.burden: Reflections sometimes show you being watched by something with too many eyes.

divineMarks.name: Divine Mark: Black Serpent
divineMarks.symbol: A black serpent biting its own shadow
divineMarks.omen: The character briefly forgets their own name, then remembers it in a voice that is not theirs.
divineMarks.rulesText: Once per long rest, you may gain advantage on a saving throw against poison or fear.
divineMarks.burden: Still water sometimes ripples toward you, even with no wind.

skillChallenges.name: Archive Escape
skillChallenges.goal: Escape the Western Archive with the fox-marked scroll case while Masked Temple Guardians attempt to separate and test the party.

support.effect: Cancel one failure or grant advantage on Athletics, Acrobatics, or Deception.
Grant advantage on Stealth, Perception, or Survival.
Remove one guardian complication or grant advantage on Sleight of Hand, Medicine, or Stealth.
Automatically reveal the fox-marked scroll case, but the player owes Seigen a favor.

results.text: Poison Breath: once per fight, 10-foot cone, DC 11 Constitution save, 1d6 poison damage on failure, half on success.
Memory Echo: speaks one sentence from the player's childhood.
Hunger Aura: creatures within 5 feet cannot regain hit points.
A shelf collapses, splitting the party.
A guardian seizes the First Bell Fragment.
Yuko is injured protecting the player.
Joka kills a guardian too quickly, escalating the scene.
Jon Soo nearly loses control of his hidden oath.
Seigen abandons the group temporarily to protect his own secrets.
Poison cup test: Constitution save or Medicine check, DC 12.
Shadow tag: Perception, Stealth, or Acrobatics, DC 12.
Sparring match: Athletics, Acrobatics, or attack roll.
Nerve test: Wisdom save or Insight check, DC 12.

companionSupport.name: Hunter's Glance
companionSupport.effect: Yuko gives the player advantage on a Perception, Insight, or Survival check.

companionSupport.name: Laughing Guard
companionSupport.effect: Jon Soo imposes disadvantage on an attack against the player if he is within 5 feet of the attacker or the player.

companionSupport.name: Zehir's Needle
companionSupport.effect: Joka poisons a weapon. On a hit, the target takes extra poison damage or has disadvantage on its next attack.
